name: Freelancer Toolkit Dashboard
description: Dashboard widgets for freelance time tracking, client billing, and project profitability.

widgets.name: Hours by Client
widgets.description: Donut chart showing hours logged per client for the current month.

widgets.name: Weekly Hours Trend
widgets.description: Bar chart of total hours logged per week over the past 8 weeks. Stacked by billable vs non-billable.

widgets.name: Project Profitability
widgets.description: Table of active projects showing quoted price, hours logged, budget percentage, and effective hourly rate. Color-coded: green (on track), yellow (80%+ budget), red (over budget).

widgets.name: Unbilled Hours Alert
widgets.description: Alert cards for clients with significant unbilled hours. Shows client name, unbilled hours, estimated unbilled amount, and days since last invoice.

widgets.name: Revenue Pipeline
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart per client showing three segments: paid (green), billed but unpaid (yellow), and unbilled tracked time (red). Gives a full picture of revenue flow.
